name: NaturVet All-In-One Support Soft Chews Dog Supplement, 120 count + NaturVet Senior Care Hip & Joint Advanced Formula Dog Soft Chews, 120 count
description: Support your sweet senior’s joints and overall health with NaturVet All-In-One Support Soft Chews Dog Supplement and NaturVet Senior Care Hip & Joint Advanced Formula Dog Soft Chews. Both supplements are formulated to support healthy hip and joint function including cartilage and connective tissues. All-in-One Support chews cover your pup’s essential health needs including digestive enzymes to help support proper digestion and a healthy digestive tract. They contain glucosamine and chondroitin for added joint support in dogs plus omega-3, -6 and -9 fatty acids for healthy skin and a glossy coat. Senior Care chews are veterinarian formulated and recommended to support healthy hips and joints. Safe for use with dogs aged 1 year and older.
